intent: Navigate to Fleet Audit while the hwLedger server is offline; the page must report a clear connect error rather than silently degrade.

steps.blind_description: Terminal showing monospaced output with a block of numeric columns. (frame slug: landing)
steps.intent: Fleet Audit page loaded, showing the configured server URL and a Refresh button in the header row.

steps.blind_description: Command-line prompt with recently-emitted lines of hex-coloured log output. (frame slug: connect-error)
steps.intent: Connect error surfaced: Streamlit prints a red banner explaining the server is unreachable (no silent fallback).

steps.blind_description: Dark terminal displaying a table of CLI results and a blinking cursor at the bottom. (frame slug: refresh-retry)
steps.intent: Refresh clicked; the error banner re-renders, confirming the retry path is explicit and visible to the operator.
